description: Canonical identity vocabulary — principal, actor, session, delegation, and harness binding. Each field has one definition and serialization consumed by all components.

principal_id.description: Stable identifier for a human or agent principal enrolled in regista's key registry

actor_id.description: The acting principal for a transition or event; must be an enrolled principal_id

actor_kind.description: Mirrors role so the cross-lineage gate can distinguish agent from human

actor_metadata.description: Free-form metadata (e.g. role, team) attached to the actor for a transition

key_id.description: The signing key used for the event; required when scheme is ed25519

agent_id.description: Model-driven actor identifier (may differ from principal_id for subagents)

on_behalf_of.description: Delegation: the principal on whose behalf the actor is acting

delegated_by.description: The principal that established the delegation

harness_version.description: Harness version at the time of capture

model_lineage.description: Model identifier for agent actors (e.g. model name and version)

project.description: The regista project slug the event belongs to

work_item_id.description: The work-item the event is bound to; null for entity-level events

invariants: actor_id must be an enrolled principal_id with an active key at event time
actor_kind must match the principal's registered role
Subagent attribution: agent_id may differ from principal_id when one agent delegates to another
Delegation chain: on_behalf_of must itself be an enrolled principal_id
Revoked keys fail verify_event_principal_binding with 'key-revoked' error
